title: C++ Base-Class Access Control
description: A diagram showing how access specifiers (public, protected, private) in inheritance affect the accessibility of base class members from the derived class.
elements: Base Class (with public, protected, private members)
relationships: Derived Class inherits from Base Class with a specific access specifier (public, protected, or private), which controls the maximum accessibility of the inherited members within the Derived Class and to External Code.
